title: Microsoft's first-ever voluntary retirement offer for 8,500-plus US employees: Here's what's in buyout package
content: Microsoft has unveiled its first voluntary retirement program, offering eligible US employees a package including five years of healthcare coverage (one fully paid), cash severance up to 39 weeks' pay, and accelerated stock vesting. This initiative aims to reduce headcount ahead of the new fiscal year, following recent layoffs and executive departures.

title: Tamil Nadu Class 12 results to be released tomorrow; here’s where and how to check
content: The Directorate of govt Examinations has set up a help desk for students and parents. Candidates with doubts or queries regarding the results may contact the helpline number 14417.

title: HAMMER bombs, kamikaze drones: Arsenal India unleashed on Pak in Op Sindoor
content: Operation Sindoor, a year after its execution, is remembered as India's firm response to terrorism, marked by precision strikes on terror infrastructure in Pakistan. This high-tech military action showcased India's advanced arsenal, including Rafale jets, SCALP missiles, and loitering munitions, demonstrating a shift towards modern, precision warfare.

title: China should not have ... : Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang after share falls to zero in Beijing
content: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang declared America a priority for advanced chip sales, stating China should not have access to the "latest and greatest" AI technology. However, he urged the US not to abandon the Chinese market entirely, arguing that global sales and increased tax revenues strengthen American economic and national security.

title: 'We won’t see him': Michael Clarke’s chilling warning on MS Dhoni’s future
content: Mahendra Singh Dhoni's IPL 2026 campaign is on hold due to a knee injury, with his return uncertain after a setback during training. Despite his absence, fan support remains immense, but concerns about his future and potential retirement are growing. Michael Clarke has defended Dhoni, highlighting his unparalleled influence on CSK and the sport, urging against premature retirement discussions.

title: During Op Sindoor, India destroyed 13 Pak aircraft, 11 airfields: Air Marshal Bharti
content: Indian forces successfully neutralized 13 Pakistani aircraft and struck 11 airfields during Op Sindoor, with evidence readily available.  Nine terrorist camps were also decimated on May 7.  Pakistan failed to inflict significant damage on Indian infrastructure, highlighting India's decisive response and strategic restraint in defending its sovereignty.

title: How Vivek Ramaswamy tamed 'anti-Indian' MAGA and Donald Trump
content: But Vivek’s rise, if things go according to plan he might become the third Indian-origin governor of an American state after Bobby Jindal and Nikki Haley, is not just a litmus test of an Indian-American’s success story in US politics. It is a test of how far the MAGA tent will accommodate a brown non-Christian man and also how far an Indian-American can go in Trump’s America.

title: Bill Gates’ Gates Foundation discloses billions invested in lesser-known AI firm, up 183% in a year
content: The Gates Foundation Trust holds a significant $3.6 billion stake in Caterpillar, a company increasingly vital for AI infrastructure. Caterpillar's Power Generation business is booming due to data center demand, with its stock soaring 183% in a year. This investment comes as the foundation itself announces substantial job cuts, impacting 20% of its workforce.

title: 10,000 extra tickets' demand for MLAs, clubs cost Bengaluru IPL final hosting: BCCI
content: While Dharamshala and New Chandigarh will host the other playoff matches, the final will be played at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad.

title: Rat poison ingredient caused deaths of four members of Mumbai family, not watermelon consumption
content: Tragedy struck a South Mumbai family as four members, including two daughters, succumbed to zinc phosphide poisoning, not watermelon as initially suspected. The family experienced severe vomiting and loose motions after consuming the chemical, commonly found in rat poison. Investigations are ongoing, with forensic reports expected to confirm the cause of death.

title: 'You put me in jail. Now, it's my turn': Messi tour organiser warns TMC
content: “Just because you have lost in the elections, don’t think that you have been punished. I will lodge a defamation case, and if needed, will go to the Supreme Court. I will fight till the end,” he wrote on Facebook stories, as quoted by Sportstar.

title: Kyle Loftis death sparks questions months after major crash
content: Kyle Loftis, founder of 1320Video, died Tuesday night, according to the platform’s official statement. His cause of death has not been confirmed yet. Loftis helped build one of the biggest motorsports media brands online through street racing and automotive content. Fans, racers, and creators across social media continue sharing tributes and remembering his influence on modern car culture.

title: Simone Biles open up on therapy as Jonathan Owens eyes NFL return
content: Simone Biles opens up about her mental health struggles following the Tokyo Olympics, reflecting on the pressure that led her to step away from competition. In a recent interview, the Olympic champion shared how the experience changed her perspective on strength and vulnerability. Two years later, Biles continues to focus on her well-being while keeping her future in gymnastics open, including a possible return for the 2028 Olympics in Los Angeles.

title: Mike Vrabel’s wife Jen ‘horrified’ as Dianna Russini controversy deepens
content: Mike Vrabel is reportedly facing growing family tension after publicly admitting he is seeking counseling following controversy tied to Dianna Russini rumors. Reports claim Jen Vrabel feels “furious,” “embarrassed,” and “horrified” by the public attention surrounding the situation. The couple was recently seen together in Utah after reportedly attending family counseling sessions, though speculation about the future of their marriage continues to intensify across NFL circles and social media.

title: Mid-air scare: Eknath Shinde’s helicopter makes U-turn amid bad weather
content: Maharashtra deputy chief minister Eknath Shinde's helicopter returned to Mumbai due to bad weather. The aircraft, en route to Murbad for a wedding, encountered an approaching storm near Airoli. The pilot's quick thinking ensured a safe landing at Juhu, with Shinde and his staff unharmed. This incident follows a past aviation tragedy involving another deputy chief minister.

title: 'Faster repatriation of illegals': India rebuts Bangladesh ‘pushback’ claims after BJP’s Bengal win
content: India urged Bangladesh to expedite nationality verification for illegal immigrants, linking it to repatriation efforts. This response follows Bangladesh's concerns about potential "pushback" incidents after the BJP's West Bengal election victory, with Dhaka seeking cooperation for smooth deportations.

title: Australia arrests 3 women returning from Syria over alleged IS links, slavery offences
content: Australian authorities apprehended three women returning from Syria with their children, facing potential slavery and terrorism charges.  These repatriated individuals, previously held in Syrian detention camps after the Islamic State's collapse, now confront serious legal proceedings.  The arrests highlight ongoing concerns about national security and the welfare of children involved.

title: ‘Baseless imputations’: MEA dismisses Canadian spy agency’s allegations on foreign interference
content: India has rejected Canadian Security Intelligence Service (CSIS) allegations of foreign interference, calling them "baseless imputations" and reiterating its policy of not interfering in other nations' internal affairs. New Delhi also raised concerns about extremist and separatist elements operating from Canadian soil, while the CSIS report noted a more restrained tone on India compared to previous assessments.

title: ‘TOWIE’ star Jake Hall passes away in villa party accident at age 35
content: Reality TV star Jake Hall, aged 35, tragically passed away following an accident at a villa party in Majorca. Reports indicate he sustained fatal head wounds from broken glass after allegedly smashing through a door. Authorities are investigating the incident, which witnesses suggest may have involved alcohol and agitation. The news has prompted widespread tributes from heartbroken fans and friends.

title: Yuzvendra Chahal vaping on flight? PBKS spinner takes a dig at Riyan Parag controversy
content: A viral clip from Punjab Kings’ travel vlog sparked controversy after Yuzvendra Chahal appeared to vape during a flight to Hyderabad. However, eagle-eyed fans later claimed the spinner may have been holding a spray device and merely mimicking the act. The moment, which was removed from the original vlog, has now fuelled speculation that Chahal was playfully referencing the recent Riyan Parag vaping controversy.

title: Op Sindoor anniversary: MEA says India gave ‘befitting reply’ to Pak-backed terror
content: India marked the first anniversary of Operation Sindoor, a decisive response to Pakistan-sponsored cross-border terrorism following the deadly Pahalgam attack. The Ministry of External Affairs stated the world recognized the attack and India's right to self-defense. The operation successfully targeted terror launchpads, demonstrating India's commitment to combating terrorism.

title: Kerala plus one improvement result 2026 release: Check how to download scorecards
content: Kerala Plus One improvement results for 2026 are now available on results.hse.kerala.gov.in. Students who took the improvement exams between March 5 and March 27 can access their scores by entering registration numbers and dates of birth. School authorities can also check results using school codes. The scorecard includes subject-wise marks and other crucial details.

title: 1 year of Op Sindoor: PM, his cabinet team change DP of their social media handles
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi urged citizens to change their social media display pictures to commemorate the first anniversary of 'Operation Sindoor'. This initiative honors the Indian armed forces' valor and decisive response during the operation along the western border. The campaign aims to express respect for the forces' success and national resolve.

title: 'Sirf hungama karna mera maqsad nahi': Army's pointed message to Pak on Op Sindoor anniversary
content: Operation Sindoor, launched in response to the Pahalgam terror attack, demonstrated India's 'Atmanirbhar' capability as a force multiplier, with over 65% of defense equipment now domestically manufactured. Lt Gen Rajiv Ghai highlighted the operation's success in achieving objectives through a calibrated, decisive response without escalating into prolonged conflict, underscoring multi-agency coordination and intelligence dominance.

title: Fact check: DNA test rumors for Dianna Russini’s sons are false parody claims
content: Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini’s alleged affair rumors have only gone worse in the last few weeks as she had to step down from her successful career, sparking outrage among fans. While Mike Vrabel’s life remains unchanged, all focus is on the children that Dianna Russini and her husband, Kevin Goldschmidt, share together, as the popular coach gets dragged into it.

title: What is the right age for your child's first smartphone? Parenting experts answer
content: Experts advise parents to consider a child's maturity, not just age, before giving them a first phone. Starting with basic devices and gradually introducing smartphones with monitoring tools is recommended. Open communication about online safety and responsible usage is crucial. Parents should also model healthy screen time habits. This approach helps children navigate the digital world safely and responsibly.

title: China sentences former defence ministers to death in sweeping military graft purge
content: China has handed down death sentences with a two-year reprieve to former defence ministers Wei Fenghe and Li Shangfu for corruption. This significant development is part of President Xi Jinping's extensive anti-graft campaign targeting the military and political elite. Both officials were found guilty of graft-related offenses, with Li Shangfu also accused of seeking improper benefits in personnel appointments.

title: Kerala govt formation: Decision on CM face likely by Sunday as AICC observers meet Cong leaders
content: The Congress is set to announce its Kerala chief ministerial pick by Sunday after consultations with newly elected MLAs and senior leaders. The party high command will make the final decision following a resolution authorizing them to choose the CM candidate. Frontrunners include V D Satheesan, K C Venugopal, and Ramesh Chennithala.

title: Middle East tensions: Iran’s response to US peace proposal expected today
content: Iran is reviewing a US proposal, with a response expected soon, potentially via Pakistani mediators. Tehran prioritizes a full war cessation and sanctions relief over nuclear talks, seeking UN Security Council guarantees.

title: Man posing as Rahul Gandhi’s PA arrested for duping Congress leader of Rs 25 lakh
content: Authorities in Dehradun have made a significant arrest, capturing a man from Amritsar who reportedly tricked a Congress functionary into handing over Rs 25 lakh by masquerading as an aide to Rahul Gandhi, promising a high-ranking party role in return. Drawing on insights from MyNeta.

title: Cusat steps up initiatives to help students deal with mental stress
content: Two students of the School of Engineering were found dead in separate incidents at their rented accommodation over the past two weeks

title: DGP calls for public partnership to curb drug menace
content: The DGP said a mandatory “I Will Not Take Drugs” declaration may soon be introduced for students at the time of admission.

title: Palaniswami saddened over Stalin’s loss from Kolathur constituency, says AIADMK
content: Confirming that some newly elected legislators of the AIADMK from Tamil Nadu are accommodated in a resort here on the ‘directions’ of Mr. Palaniswami, Mr. Anbalgan said that all legislators are united under the leadership of party general secretary

title: Teachers urged to focus on developing students’ thinking skills, creativity
content: Addressing participants of a faculty development programme, former Director of IIT-Delhi says that student-focused teaching approaches, technology integration, and interactive discussion methods contribute to better learning outcomes

title: SC asks Centre to vest District Collectors with powers to enforce waste management rules
content: The rules embody efforts to protect the planet and the nation from ‘man-made destruction’, the top court says

title: Election Commission seized illicit inducements worth ₹1,400 crore during Assembly polls
content: West Bengal saw the highest increase in the seizures at 68.92%, and in Tamil Nadu this increased by 48.4% compared to the corresponding figures during the 2021 polls

title: Five CPI(M) workers sentenced to jail in attempted murder case
content: The accused trespassed into the house premises of BMS leader K. Ramesan in Eranholi and attacked him with deadly weapons on May 9, 2016, says the prosecution

title: Woman, paramour hire gang for ₹12 lakh to kill husband
content: Five people have been arrested, says Eluru SP, adding that police have seized ₹75,000 in cash and mobile charger cable purportedly used during the crime

title: Telangana tops India in cybercrime cases in 2024
content: According to NCRB report, State accounted for nearly 27% of the country’s cybercrime cases in 2024; Hyderabad ranked among India’s leading urban fraud hotspots despite a decline in city-level cases

title: Kozhikode Corporation faces opposition over West Hill STP project
content: Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe Protection Committee says the Corporation’s plan to set up the plant at Shanti Nagar, where hundreds of ordinary families live, amounts to violation of constitutional rights

title: YSRCP insists on transparency in SIR process
content: It urges CEO to share constituency-wise and booth-wise voter lists in a digital, searchable format, along with complete BLO details

title: Governor should act according to the Constitution and invite TVK to form govt.: Arunraaj
content: The Supreme Court of India, in several judgments, has clearly said the majority should only be proved on the floor of the House, says TVK general secretary

title: Seven infants received at ‘Ammathottil’ in Kozhikode in nine months
content: The district secretary of the Kerala State Council for Child Welfare and the district manager of Sisu Vikas Bhavan receive a mobile app alert as soon as a child is found in the cradle, following which hospital staff inspect the child’s health indicators before adoption procedures are initiated

title: Karnataka launches state-of-the-art Health Emergency Operations Centre in Bengaluru
content: The initiative follows lessons learnt during the COVID-19 pandemic, which exposed gaps in co-ordination, real-time surveillance and rapid response systems

title: A.P. witnessing one MoU a day, one groundbreaking event a week, says Naidu
content: Chief Minister N. Chandrababu Naidu calls for faster, innovation-led governance to position the State as a 'national benchmark' in development, investments and public service delivery

title: ‘Mee Intiki – Mee Doctor’ project to offer primary healthcare services at doorstep
content: Governor launches the new initiative aimed at extending medical aid to 5 lakh poor families at the doorsteps in inaccessible areas in seven districts over a period of three years on World Red Cross Day

title: CM Chandrababu Naidu credits ‘Business Reformer’ award to ‘Team A.P.’
content: Two years ago, people spoke differently about Andhra Pradesh, but today, the perception has completely changed, he says at the 7th Collectors’ Conference

title: Global congestion indices have risen from 20% to 25%: CAG
content: CAG is conducting a special audit of 101 Indian cities, assessing Ease of Living from the citizen’s perspective, across quality of life, access, sustainability and perception

title: Remaining stretch of Mullassery canal to be restored within 6-8 months
content: Of the canal’s 829-metre length, the stretch up to Chittoor Road was restored last September using the cast-in-situ method. The remaining stretch will be restored in three phases

title: Operation Sindoor reflects India’s uncompromising stand against terrorism: PM Modi
content: To mark the first anniversary, PM lauds the armed forces for their bravery and dedication in attacking terrorist camps and military infrastructure in Pakistan and Pakistan-occupied Kashmir

title: Maharashtra Dy CM Eknath Shinde unhurt after mid-air scare aboard helicopter
content: An official statement said the incident happened when the Maharashtra Deputy Chief Minister  was flying in a helicopter from Mumbai to Murbad to attend a wedding ceremony in the family of a party colleague; the pilot noticed an approaching storm system and turned around the helicopter

title: Govt. formation: CPI(M) and CPI general secretaries denounce T.N. Governor
content: TN Governor’s decision not to call TVK chief C. Joseph Vijay to form the government is undemocratic, the two leaders said, adding that the government’s strength should be tested on the floor of the Assembly and not in Governor’s residence

title: Fish and festivity: Hundreds participate in ‘Kere Bete’ at Chittur in Sorab taluk
content: ‘Kere Bete’ is a summer fishing sport organised in Shivamogga and neighbouring districts of Karnataka

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: Kerala Congress turns electoral revival into  bargaining chip
content: Party has staked claim for two ministerial berths and the post of Chief Whip in the incoming United Democratic Front Cabinet

title: A.P. CM calls for adoption of Singapore’s best practices in one district as a model
content: Chandrababu Naidu directs preparation of a 90-day action plan for implementing the governance practices on a larger scale in future

title: Watch: Vijay won, but why can’t he become Chief Minister yet?
content: For the first time since 1952, Tamil Nadu has delivered a fractured mandate in an Assembly election? The man behind this turn of events is cinema superstar Vijay, who not only entered politics but also stunned the two Dravidian rivals, the DMK and AIADMK. But Vijay;s TVK managed only 108 seats on its own, short of the majority mark of 118. Vijay will need the support of smaller parties for form the government and with the Congress in the mix, it poses a very interesting situation. So, what are the scenarios? What role does the Governor play?

title: Centre has given positive response to demand for widening NH 150A, says MP
content: The road development works will significantly boost the social and economic development of Yadgir and Raichur districts: Kumar Naik

title: Guntur sees decline in major crimes, except for robberies and break-ins
content: SP attributes the drop in crime rates during the first four months of 2026 to intensified patrolling, surveillance, improved investigation standards and continuous monitoring by police officers at different levels

title: Demographic imbalance in India needs more attention than population control, says RSS chief Mohan Bhagwat
content: With to Common Civil Code, Mr. Bhagwat referred to the introduction of the law in a few States in India, including Uttarakhand, and expressed optimism that the Uniform Civil Code will gradually be implemented across India

title: In the next big eviction drive after Munnar, 88 illegal constructions demolished in Idukki
content: 29 houses, three religious institutions, and 56 commercial establishments built on encroached land on the riverbed of the Panniyar River evicted

title: DRDO’s aircraft integration and flight testing complex to come up in Puttaparthi
content: To be developed by Aeronautical Development Agency, the facility is expected to play a critical role in advancing the programmes pertaining to Advanced Medium Combat Aircraft and future indigenous combat aircraft and unmanned aerial systems

title: Tirupati-Pandharpur weekly special to be regularised starting May 16
content: The weekly service will provide improved rail connectivity between the two major pilgrimage centres in Maharashtra and Andhra Pradesh

title: Climate change threatens Painted Storks’ breeding habitat in Veerapuram village
content: Researchers call for an action plan to protect the wetlands from encroachment, creating artificial nesting platforms, and surveillance of the core zone with drones

title: Maharashtra government forced to cancel Hindi exam for employees after outrage
content: Marathi language groups have hailed the government’s decision, but have demanded that the rule and the exam should be scrapped altogether

title: Accident numbers down, 17 linked to negligence by civic bodies; city tops pedestrian deaths
content: Only Bengaluru and Delhi have been registering accidents caused due to the negligence of civic bodies; other cities do not

title: Students urged to stay away from drugs, dependence mobile phones
content: Eminent psychiatrist C.R. Chandrasekhar was speaking on ‘Mental Health, Well Being and Ragging-Free Campus’ at Sharnbasva University

title: M.K. Stalin convenes meeting with allies as DMK second-line leaders press for coalition with AIADMK
content: CPI(M) State secretary P. Shanmugam, CPI State secretary M. Veerapandian, and VCK leader Thol. Thirumavalavan were among those who rushed to Mr. Stalin’s Cenotaph Road residence to attend the meeting on May 7, 2026

title: Before Chandranath Rath, Suvendu Adhikari Lost 3 Aides In 13 Years
content: The latest incident involves Chandranath Rath, another close aide of Adhikari, who was shot dead in North 24 Parganas last night.

title: EU Firms Generate 186 Billion Euros In India, Support 6 Million Jobs: Report
content: Nearly 6,000 European companies now account for 5 per cent of India's GDP and a quarter of its manufacturing turnover, marking a decade of deepening economic integration

title: Throat Slashed, Pune Woman Writes Attacker's Name. It Was Her Lover
content: The woman was alone at home when her lover allegedly entered the residence and slashed her throat with a blade before fleeing.

title: Congress Won Big In Assam's Muslim-Dominated Seats: Decoding The Shift
content: Political observers believe the biggest reason behind this trend was the collapse of the All-India United Democratic Front (AIUDF).

title: "Will Continue His Work": Nitish Kumar's Son After Taking Oath As Bihar Minister
content: Nishant Kumar, the 51-year-old son of former Bihar Chief Minister Nitish Kumar, was among the 32 ministers of Bihar who took oath today.

title: 'Death Finds Us All': Wife Remembers Senior Jammu and Kashmir Officer Who Died During Op Sindoor
content: As the District Development Commissioner, he refused to leave his post, choosing to stay with the people who needed him most.

title: Israel Kills Hezbollah Commander In First Strike On Beirut Amid Ceasefire
content: Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and Defence Minister Israel Katz announced the attack on Hezbollah commander in a joint statement on Wednesday.

title: 'Diversity Is India's Strength': Supreme Court On Sabarimala-Linked Case
content: Justice BV Nagarathna pointed out "what's troubling the court" while hearing arguments by petitioners defending the grounds taken by the landmark Sabarimala verdict of 2018

title: Satellite Pics Show Iran Strikes Damaged 228 Assets Across 15 US Bases
content: Among the sites that were damaged in Iran's missile and drone strikes was a satellite communications site at al-Udeid Air Base in Qatar. Patriot missile defence systems at bases in Bahrain and Kuwait were also hit.

title: Opinion: Opinion | One Year Of Op Sindoor: Why 'Round 2' Will Be A Different Beast Entirely
content: Another Op Sindoor - highly likely - would have to be framed and executed in quite a different milieu.

title: Fearing Failure, 19-Year-Old NEET Aspirant Dies By Suicide In Odisha
content: According to police, he was found hanging from the ceiling of their rented house in Bhadrak town police station area.

title: BJP Sweeps Scheduled Caste, Tribal Belts In Bengal, Assam
content: The BJP swept all 16 reserved seats for Scheduled Tribes in West Bengal and won 51 of the state's 68 Scheduled Caste constituencies, reducing the Trinamool Congress to just 17 reserved seats

title: Inducements Worth Rs 1,445 Crore Seized During 2026 Assembly Elections: Poll Body
content: West Bengal saw the highest increase in the seizures of 68.92 per cent, and Tamil Nadu saw an increase in seizures of 48.40 per cent in 2026 compared to the corresponding figures during the 2021 elections.

title: Man Arrested For Allegedly Filming Woman Bathing In Bengaluru
content: Police said the woman noticed an unidentified individual allegedly recording a video using a mobile phone while she was inside the bathroom.

title: Char Dham Yatra Sees 32 Pilgrim Deaths In 19 Days, Kedarnath Worst Hit
content: Uttarakhand Forest Minister Subodh Uniyal said health advisories were also shared during the registration process for the yatra.

title: BJP Sends Defamation Notice To Bhagwant Mann Over Punjab Blasts' Allegations
content: Bhagwant Mann on Wednesday held the BJP responsible for the two blast incidents, alleging this was how the party was preparing for the upcoming assembly elections in the state.

title: Stock Market Highlights, Sensex Today: Sensex, Nifty Settle Flat Amid Mixed Global Cues
content: Stock Market, Sensex, Share Market, Nifty LIVE Updates: Asian markets rally on growing optimism that the US and Iran were nearing an agreement.

title: Opinion: Opinion | Is INDIA Bloc Set To Split After Tamil Nadu, Bengal Results? A Look At The Mess
content: Reportedly, Rahul was quick to realise his folly of not siding with Vijay sooner, the day votes were cast across Tamil Nadu. By April 24-25, he had told a close aide, "We made a blunder in Tamil Nadu."
